name: trace_window_edge_drag
description: v2.7.3 W3: idle header stays paint-free, real hover reveals dump-ground-truth ports, the RIGHT port drags left ~2 week units with live pill + header preview pixel-diff, and the release now REALLY commits: doc windowStart/End equal the pill's dates, PP_PROJ is rewritten (minDay==windowStart, pad 0), and the header repaints once the commit lands (m9). A second threshold-crossing drag that returns to its origin proves the zero-delta release no-op (no doc write, no rebuild, no undo entry).
